# Cosmic Horizon: Expanding Our Vision
## Scripture
"But will God really dwell on earth? The heavens, even the highest heaven, cannot contain you. How much less this temple I have built!" - 1 Kings 8:27

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we're reminded of the vastness of God's creation. The celestial expanse stretches out before us, a seemingly endless canvas of stars, planets, and galaxies. Yet, even this vastness is insufficient to contain the greatness of our God. The Bible reminds us that not even the highest heaven can hold Him, let alone any earthly structure we might build. This realization should expand our vision, helping us see beyond the limitations of our own understanding and capabilities. Just as the cosmic horizon stretches out before us, so too should our faith and trust in God's sovereignty over all creation.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we ponder the vastness of your creation, we're humbled by the realization of your infinite nature. Help us to expand our vision, to see beyond the horizons of our own understanding, and to trust in your sovereign plan for our lives. May the beauty of the night sky remind us of your greatness and inspire us to worship you with reverence and awe. Thank you for being a God who is beyond containment, yet intimately close to our hearts. Amen.
